content:
什么，还得再做一次自我介绍？我以为我们已经够熟了哈哈。
嗨临时调查…不对，是守密人！

咳守密人，我叫茉夏，请告诉我更多关于这个世界的不无聊情报：
✍🏻 哪里融蚀体最多？哪家餐馆最好吃？哪个唤醒体最爱打架？
✍🏻 ……尽管告诉我吧！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Aha? You want me to introduce myself again? I thought we were already close enough, haha.
Hi there, my temporary IIC... I mean, Keeper!

Ahem, Keeper, I'm Mouchette. Please tell me more about this world. No boring stuff, please.
✍🏻 Where can I find the most Dissolutes to fight? 
✍🏻 Which restaurant serves the best food? 
✍🏻 Which Awakener loves fighting the most?
✍🏻...Just tell me everything!
